name: brainana-viewer
description: Cross-platform NiiVue viewer for brainana pipeline output (source-first rebuild).
author: Brainana
//main: Electron entry for the packaged desktop app (electron-builder reads this from the root package.json). Ignored by the browser/headless paths.
//workspaces: Multi-tool monorepo: shared packages/* consumed by apps/*. Globs match nothing until packages are extracted (harmless no-op meanwhile); see docs/technical-route.md.
//dependencies: Runtime deps of the PACKAGED desktop app. electron-builder derives the shipped node_modules from THIS list, so the three @brainana/* server-side workspace packages must be declared here to be dereferenced into the app.asar. The frontend packages (core-client/ui/niivue-kit/imaging-math) are NOT listed — Vite bundles them into dist/, so they need no runtime node_modules copy.
//browserslist: Single source of the evergreen support policy (roadmap §6.3): Chrome/Edge baseline, Firefox/Safari last 2 majors. WebGL2 is a hard requirement gated at runtime in browserCapabilities.ts. Out of scope: mobile/legacy.
